title: Art in motion dancers qualify for Croatia
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Five dancers from Art In...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Five dancers from Art In Motion Dance Academy in Knysna delivered standout performances at the Dance Star South African Qualifiers held in Cape Town from 5 to 8 November.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Five dancers from Art In Motion Dance Academy in Knysna delivered standout performances at the Dance Star South African Qualifiers held in Cape Town from 5 to 8 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event, a high-stakes gathering of the nation's top young talents, saw all five representatives secure spots on the national team bound for the prestigious World Dance Masters in Croatia in 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ages ranging from 9 to 28, the Art In Motion contingent demonstrated versatility and excellence across genres such as jazz, hip hop, lyrical, acro and contemporary.","html":"Ages ranging from 9 to 28, the Art In Motion contingent demonstrated versatility and excellence across genres such as jazz, hip hop, lyrical, acro and contemporary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are immensely proud of every one of our dancers. Their hard work, passion and perseverance truly paid off. Qualifying for the South African team is an incredible achievement and a testament to their talent and commitment,\" said a representative of Art In Motion Dance Academy.","html":"\"We are immensely proud of every one of our dancers. Their hard work, passion and perseverance truly paid off. Qualifying for the South African team is an incredible achievement and a testament to their talent and commitment,\" said a representative of Art In Motion Dance Academy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the qualifiers now behind them, the dancers will shift their focus to intensive training for the international stage.","html":"With the qualifiers now behind them, the dancers will shift their focus to intensive training for the international stage."},{"type":"heading","text":"Results","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["Harlow Holmes (13)","Jazz Solo (juniors) - 7th","Hip Hop Solo (juniors) - 4th","Harlow Holmes (13) and Nomsah Mukundwa (12)","Hip Hop Duet (juniors) - 3rd","Nomsah Mukundwa (12)","Jazz Solo (Juniors) - 10th","Hip Hop Solo (juniors) - 3rd","Jordin Thompson (9)","Lyrical Solo (children) - 9th","Jazz Solo (children) - 5th","Acro Solo (children) - 7th","Contemporary Solo (children) - 4th","Jordin Thompson (9) and Harlow Holmes (13)","Lyrical Duet (children) - 4th","Nicole van Strijp (20)","Contemporary Solo (seniors) - 14th","Maria Coetzer (28)","Lyrical Solo (seniors - 12th","Maria Coetzer (28) and Nicole van Strijp (20)","Lyrical Duet (seniors - 3rd"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Art in motion dancers qualify for Croatia
